hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Soup.net is connected — your taste/judgment work has a persistent corpus to draw on and contribute to. Recipes are role-based, written from the human user perspective: As a [their role] working on [their goal], I [prefer/chose] so that [reason]. Pick a role that transfers across users and projects (e.g., front-end React developer), not the user name and not the project name when the group description already implies it. Tools available: check_recipe, list_my_recipe_books, get_briefing. See soupnet-guide skill for when to check."}}'
